pages.text: Beyond walls and light, biomancy grows a handful of living utility blocks — storage and automation with appetites and loyalties of their own.
pages.title: Fleshborne Utility

pages.text: The $(flesh)Fleshkin Chest$() is a storage chest that knows its owner. It opens for you and bites at anyone else who tries — living security, grown rather than locked. Its owner is recorded when it is placed.

$(bold)More living blocks:$()$(br)$(li)$(flesh)Storage Sac$() — a grown storage block, biomancy's take on the barrel.$(li)$(flesh)Maw Hopper$() — a mouth that swallows items like a hopper.$(li)$(flesh)Tongue$() — a reaching block that pulls in items or creatures.$(li)$(flesh)Chrysalis$() — a grown cocoon; biomancy's incubator, forged with eggs and fibres.
pages.title: Mouths & Sacs

pages.text: $(bold)Vial Holder & Organic Vials.$() Serums and fluids store in $(flesh)Organic Vials$(); a wall-mounted $(flesh)Vial Holder$() keeps them to hand beside a Bio-Lab. Small comforts for a flesh-built workshop.
pages.title: Vials
